text: Created ticket Migrate specs, plans, and ticketing stores to shared storage

Began the t-0051 execution-layer migration. The current package graph now has async shared-storage cutover for constitution, research, and initiatives, including projection-reader compatibility for still-file-backed consumers. I started the specs package migration by wiring in the shared storage dependency and verifying the existing spec package surface/tests that will need async/canonical rewrites next. This ticket remains in progress; canonical cutover for specs, plans, and ticketing is not finished yet.

Continued t-0051 by wiring `@pi-loom/pi-storage` into `pi-specs`, `pi-plans`, and `pi-ticketing` package manifests where needed, isolating their test suites with per-workspace `PI_LOOM_ROOT`, and revalidating the untouched baseline spec and ticketing package slices. Also updated dependent async consumers after the upstream async migration so typecheck remains green. The next substantive step for t-0051 is the actual canonical `SpecStore` cutover onto shared storage, followed by `PlanStore` and `TicketStore`. Verification so far: `npm test -- --run packages/pi-specs/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-specs/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-specs/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-specs/__tests__/projection.test.ts packages/pi-ticketing/__tests__/store.test.ts && npm run typecheck`.

Completed the pi-specs portion of t-0051. The spec store now persists canonical spec changes and canonical capabilities through @pi-loom/pi-storage, exposes async public APIs, preserves repo-materialized markdown bodies as projections, and provides sync projection readers for still-file-backed consumers. Updated pi-specs commands/tools/index, spec projection flow, downstream sync consumers (initiatives/research/docs/critique/plans/ralph), and focused tests. Verification so far: npm run typecheck plus focused tests for pi-specs and touched dependents all passed.

Completed the pi-plans portion of t-0051. The plan store now persists canonical plan state through @pi-loom/pi-storage, materializes packet.md / plan.md / dashboard.json as projections, exposes async public APIs, and provides sync projection reads for still-non-migrated consumers like Ralph. Updated plan commands/tools/index and plan-focused tests. Verification for this slice: npm run typecheck plus focused plan/spec/critique/docs test slices passed.

Advanced the pi-ticketing portion of t-0051. The ticketing package now exposes async canonical wrappers (`*Async`) for command/tool/index surfaces, syncs canonical ticket entities into @pi-loom/pi-storage, and keeps projection compatibility methods for still-unmigrated consumers. Also updated plans/initiatives/research consumers where needed and ran the full specs/plans/ticketing verification slice. Verification: 24 focused test files / 40 tests passed and npm run typecheck passed. Remaining concern: ticketing still has bridge resync from projections for compatibility, so I have not yet marked t-0051 complete.

Verification complete: npm test -- --run packages/pi-specs/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-specs/__tests__/projection.test.ts packages/pi-specs/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-specs/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-specs/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-initiatives/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-initiatives/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-initiatives/__tests__/dashboard.test.ts packages/pi-research/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-research/__tests__/integration-smoke.test.ts packages/pi-plans/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-plans/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-plans/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-plans/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-docs/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-critique/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-ticketing/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-ticketing/__tests__/attachments.test.ts packages/pi-ticketing/__tests__/checkpoints.test.ts packages/pi-ticketing/__tests__/graph.test.ts packages/pi-ticketing/__tests__/journal.test.ts packages/pi-ticketing/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-ticketing/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-ticketing/__tests__/index.test.ts (24 files / 40 tests passed) and npm run typecheck passed.
